title: Captives in India

source.file: input_data/corpus/Captive Operations Details Jun 2021 v3 - Copy.xlsx

grain: one row per company operating a captive / shared-services center in India
summary: A hand-compiled profile of companies running captive or shared-services operations based in India. Each row names a company and describes its captive footprint: the cities/countries where it operates, headcount (FTEs), the business verticals and functional areas handled, the type of operations, the geographies served, plus narrative notes on internal contacts and how COVID affected the operation. It is a qualitative reference for who has captive centers in India and what those centers do.
use_cases: Which companies run captive/shared-service centers in India?
Where (which cities) is a given company's captive located and how many FTEs does it have?
What business verticals and areas of operation does a company's India captive cover?
Which captives serve global vs US-only geographies?
What internal contacts or connections do we have at a company's captive?
How did COVID affect a particular captive's ways of working (WFH/WFO)?

columns.name: S. No.
columns.note: Row serial number, 1-7; not a business measure.

columns.name: Location
columns.note: Bulleted list of cities/countries; can hold multiple sites per row.

columns.name: No. of FTE's
columns.note: Free-form headcount: exact numbers, ranges (e.g. '1500 - 1700'), or approximations ('1400+'); not a clean numeric.

columns.name: Vertical/ BU
columns.note: Business unit / vertical, sometimes a single label, sometimes a bulleted list.

columns.name: Areas of Operations
columns.note: Functions performed at the captive (back office, analytics, ITO, etc.).

columns.name: Type of Operations
columns.note: Comma-separated operation types (BPO, F&A, IT, Consulting, etc.).

columns.name: Geos Served
columns.note: Geography served by the captive (e.g. Global, US); ~29% blank.

columns.name: Subjective Commentary
columns.note: Named internal contacts / relationship notes about the captive.

columns.name: COVID's Impact on Operations
columns.note: Narrative on COVID effect / WFH-WFO arrangements; sometimes blank.

examples.Location:
• Noida, India
• Jaipur, India
• Queretaro, Mexico
examples.Vertical/ BU:
• Individual & Group Ins
• P&C
• Corporate Functions
examples.Subjective Commentary:
Kush Kamra
Yes we have a connect
examples.COVID's Impact on Operations: No they are not as per our knowledge. The business is stable and the team members are working from home in India.

not_answerable.q: What is the annual revenue or operating cost of each captive?
not_answerable.reason: No financial/revenue or cost column exists in the table.

not_answerable.q: When was each captive established, and how has headcount changed over time?
not_answerable.reason: No founding-date column and no time series; only a single point-in-time FTE figure.

not_answerable.q: Which captives are located in the Philippines?
not_answerable.reason: This sheet only covers India-based captives; Philippines captives are in a separate sheet.

warnings: near-duplicate column set with 'Captives in the Philippines' (same schema, different entities/rows)
